mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the unemployment rate below 4.5% signals strong labor market conditions that boost corporate earnings visibility, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of instances where UNRATE falls below 4.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production and payroll employment indicates robust economic activity, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days through improved corporate revenue outlooks.
failure_condition: The joint growth of INDPRO and PAYEMS fails to produce positive 20d returns in > 50% of cases, or their correlation with SPX returns drops below 0.15.

mechanism_narrative: A recovery in housing starts combined with rising real sales figures signals improved consumer demand, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days through stronger corporate revenue expectations.
failure_condition: The combined growth of HOUST and RSAFS fails to produce positive 60d returns in > 50% of cases, or their predictive power for SPX returns is statistically insignificant (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPI reading above 320 signals inflationary pressures that prompt central bank tightening, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days through higher discount rates.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 320.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in industrial production below 100 signals weakening manufacturing activity, which drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days through reduced corporate earnings visibility.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where INDPRO falls below 100.

mechanism_narrative: A combination of rising inflation (CPIAUCSL) and elevated policy rates (FEDFUNDS) indicates a tightening cycle, which drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days through reduced liquidity and higher borrowing costs.
failure_condition: The joint rise of CPIAUCSL and FEDFUNDS fails to produce negative 60d returns in > 50% of cases, or their combined predictive power for SPX returns is statistically insignificant (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: A quarterly GDP growth rate above 0.5% signals strong macroeconomic momentum, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days through improved corporate earnings outlooks.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 60% of instances where GDPC1 exceeds 0.5%.
